character_designs.name_cn: 拓跋砚熊多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: White Bear clan shield-guard and snow-forge craftsman responsible for repairing Northern bone-iron gear

body_and_face.age_lock: 30 to 40, adult male or gender-neutral sturdy beastfolk artisan; not young, not elderly.
body_and_face.tier_lock: Lower craft and military artisan tier, mostly upright bear-bodied beastfolk with readable emotion; not a noble humanoid with decorative ears.
body_and_face.scale: About 2.18-2.28 m tall and 210-260 kg, visually two to three times the mass of an ordinary human heavy soldier.
body_and_face.build: Shield-like chest, very broad shoulders and back, short thick neck, thick waist without obesity, extremely thick forearms, huge hands larger than a human face, visible short claws.
body_and_face.face: White bear face with round ears, short wide muzzle, heavy brow, broad nose bridge, wide jaw, sideburn and chin down, and deep brown eyes with restrained cold-blue catchlight.
body_and_face.posture: Steady, grounded, protective, shoulders move first; suitable for holding a shield with one hand and repairing gear with the other.
body_and_face.expression: Calm, patient, alert, craft-focused, protective without monster rage.

constant_anchors: heavy brow and broad nose bridge
white bear down around sideburns and chin
huge forearms and oversized hands with short claws
white bear fur mantle hanging from shoulders to rear waist
heavy deep-brown leather apron with ember scorch marks
large plain repaired bone-iron or wood-iron shield
heavy boots with ice studs and bear-claw tread
northern bonewood, fur, old iron, rawhide cord, oath-cord, frozen earth, and restrained ember material language without redesigning the locked Wanshou emblem

state_designs.episode_range: Reusable northern migration camp, siege repair, and beastfolk logistics shots
state_designs.silhouette: Massive upright white bear artisan in fur mantle, black iron chest band, scorched leather apron, tool chain, and repair stance beside a low work block.
state_designs.color_logic: White fur, black iron, dark leather, bone white, frozen grey, and small ember dark red dominate; no bright magic.
state_designs.damage_level: Wind wear, tool wear, and apron ember scorching only; no beggar rags or monster gore.
required_details: bear face and round ears must remain clear
tool chain must read before weapon identity
apron scorch marks must stay local and controlled
fire-seed jar must be small and physical, not a spell focus

state_designs.episode_range: Reusable guard, shield-wall repair, escort, and northern defensive shots
state_designs.silhouette: Same heavy bear body with fur mantle tightened, black iron chest band exposed, great repaired shield forward, short guard axe or hammer at side.
materials: plain repaired bone-iron or wood-iron great shield
heavy leather apron strapped for movement
state_designs.color_logic: Black iron and shield bone/wood surfaces become more visible; white fur remains species anchor; dark red oath cord remains tiny.
state_designs.damage_level: Dents, scratches, old repairs, and snow grit; no painted shield symbol and no clean fantasy plate armor.
required_details: great shield must read large enough to cover an ordinary human
shield surface must be practical and mostly unmarked
same face, ears, fur, chest band, apron, and tool logic must remain continuous
pose is protective and stable, not a berserker charge

state_designs.episode_range: Reusable frozen migration camp, field repair, logistics, and post-siege shots
state_designs.silhouette: Same bear artisan traveling with shield on back or at side, compact tool chain, rivet pouch, blackstone wedge bag, rawhide repair cords, old wood braces, and protected ember seed jar.
state_designs.color_logic: Frozen earth grey, blackstone, deep brown leather, white fur, old wood, and ember red show travel pressure and craft function.
state_designs.damage_level: Snow dust, rubbed leather, worn tools, and small ember scars only; no refugee collapse.
required_details: tools must be compacted for travel rather than absent
shield must remain visible as guard function
fire-seed jar must be protected as practical survival equipment
do not make him a noble ceremonial guard or generic siege breacher

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Tuoba Yanxiong as a White Bear clan beastfolk artisan, not a human wearing fur.
detail_panels.notes: Round bear ears, short wide muzzle, heavy brow, broad nose bridge, white bear down, deep brown eyes, calm expression.

detail_panels.purpose: Show craft identity and physical scale.
detail_panels.notes: Huge hand with short claws holding an iron file, hammer, tongs, or repair tool.

detail_panels.purpose: Create a stable costume anchor across all states.
detail_panels.notes: Horizontal black iron chest band over white fur and shield-like chest mass.

detail_panels.purpose: Make his profession readable at medium distance.
detail_panels.notes: Iron file, bone hammer, rivet pouch, old iron tongs, blackstone wedges, rawhide repair cord.

detail_panels.purpose: Distinguish snow-forge labor from ragged poverty.
detail_panels.notes: Deep brown heavy leather apron, local ember scorch marks along edge, intact garment structure.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock shield-guard function without creating a new badge.
detail_panels.notes: Great repaired shield with old iron rivets, rawhide straps, dents, scratches, and no emblem.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry snow-forge survival and craft identity.
detail_panels.notes: Small physical jar or cup with restrained ember-dark red glow, tied to belt, not attack magic.

detail_panels.purpose: Tie costume to Northern low-technology craft materials.
detail_panels.notes: Bronze bracer, beast-bone toggles, thick hemp waist rope, dark red oath cord as tiny accent.

detail_panels.purpose: Make the bear-bodied scale plausible on frozen ground.
detail_panels.notes: Heavy boot sole, ice studs, bear-claw tread and blackstone snow dust.
White bear fur, black iron, bronze, deep brown leather, bone white, old wood, frozen earth grey, blackstone snow dust, dark red oath cord, ember dark red.
